plugins.name: arabic-flashcards
plugins.description: Create thematic Arabic flashcard decks (Najdi Saudi or Modern Standard Arabic) with two simple example sentences per card and TTS-generated audio. Emits Markdown cards, a single-file HTML flip-card viewer, and an Anki import CSV.

plugins.name: arabic-training-plan
plugins.description: Build and run a Test-Teach-Test training plan for Arabic vocabulary. SMART goal, motivation, core principles (dialect grammar), and key-fact sub-goals covering word batches. Interactive TTT sessions only -- no flashcards. Audio generated once per word and referenced by filename. Spaced retention drives each sub-goal to Mastery 5/5.
